title: Primus: AlienEvo AddonPack
description: An Addon for Ad Astra that brings ben 10 related planets and systems to the mod
body:
![Primus Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23d562ff08478343962066e4027b01014b2af68f_0.webp)

# DISCLAIMER

The addon is still currently in active development, expect bugs and lag

Don't expect to be able to live on Pyros as Heatblast as of right now

**If you decide to travel to Pyros MAKE SURE YOUR Y LEVEL IS HIGHER THAN 70 UNLESS YOU WANT TO LAND IN LAVA**
## Content

This addon will, in the future, bring all of the Ben 10 classic alien homeworlds to Ad Astra with unique mounts blocks trees mobs and other cool stuff. (Currently the addon is not really compatible with Alien Evo itself)

## Pyros
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

When traveling to Pyros, you must be careful since if your Y level is lower than 70, you will end up in lava.

Since the addon in the 0.1.0 version doesn't make Heatblast live on Pyros, I would suggest using either the ITO Suit or Jet Suit from Ad Astra.

While wandering Pyros, you will find one of the three important things on the planet : a wild Crabdozer, a Pyronite Village, or volcanoes, which are the most popular things to find.

When you find a village , you will discover some neat loot like iron and gold or frigyd shards, which you can use to trade with Pyronites. Using a brush on the employed Pyronites will make them drop Pyronite flakes.

Using those Pyronite flakes, you can tame a Crabdozer, which works like a horse/dog hybrid, meaning you can mount it , and if someone attacks you or you attack something, they will start attacking it too. You can also make them sit.

Volcanoes are just there to add a hellish vibe to Pyros and to give the player some useful resources

</details>



## How to travel to those homeworlds

To travel to the homeworlds, you first need to get a tier 4 rocket. Then by using it you should be able to reach those homeworlds (It's recommended to also have the Jet Suit)

## Dependencies
[Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra)

[Botarium](https://modrinth.com/mod/botarium)

[Resourceful Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/resourceful-lib)

[Resourceful Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/resourceful-config)
